overall.description: A first-person exploration through a dark, abandoned corporate facility in a video game, featuring cyan fluorescent lighting and red neon accents. The camera moves steadily through a plant-lined corridor, transitions through a lobby with vivid red signage, and explores an office interior where furniture is covered in white sheets.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor with potted plants and overhead fluorescent lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down a dark corridor lined with potted plants on black pedestals

entered.detail: long cyan fluorescent light tubes running along the ceiling
tall green plant on a black rectangular pedestal
dark concrete or metal wall panels with vertical slats
dark reception counter visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, dark corridor illuminated by cyan fluorescent tubes overhead. Potted plants on black pedestals line the walkway as the camera moves steadily forward through the enclosed space toward a distant opening.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate lobby with red neon signage

events.description: exits narrow corridor into wide lobby area with open sightlines
red neon signage becomes visible, mixing red hues with the existing cyan lighting
turns left toward a glass doorway leading to an office interior

agents.ego_description: moving through the lobby toward the red-lit area and turning into an office entrance

entered.detail: bright red neon signage mounted on the wall
large furniture piece covered with a white sheet
glass partition walls and doorways leading to side rooms

segments.scene_description: The space opens into a wide lobby where red neon lights contrast with the cyan fluorescence. The camera passes covered furniture and turns toward a glass doorway, transitioning from the open lobby toward a darker office interior.

events.description: enters dark office room through glass doors
slows to examine details of covered desks and scattered documents

agents.ego_description: exploring the abandoned office interior, examining desks covered in white sheets and scattered papers on the floor

entered.detail: rectangular fluorescent ceiling panels emitting greenish light
office desk covered with a draped white sheet
black ergonomic office chair next to the desk
silver adjustable desk lamp on the covered desk
tall vertical window blinds covering the far wall

segments.scene_description: Inside the abandoned office, rectangular ceiling panels cast a greenish glow over desks shrouded in white sheets. The camera explores the room, passing office chairs and desk lamps, and approaches a conference area with vertical blinds while scattered papers litter the tiled floor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sterile corporate facility that transitions from a narrow, cyan-lit corridor into a sprawling, abandoned office interior. It begins by gliding through a dark walkway lined with potted plants on black pedestals, moving steadily toward a distant opening. As the space expands, the camera enters a wide lobby where vivid red neon accents contrast with the overhead cyan fluorescence before turning toward a glass doorway. The scene then shifts into a darker office environment, where the lighting turns to a greenish glow cast by rectangular ceiling panels. Finally, the camera explores the room past desks shrouded in white sheets and scattered papers, moving toward a conference area with vertical blinds.
